description: Minimalist personal link saver with predefined labels, auto-fetched metadata, Neo Brutalism UI, and Convex backend

userStories.title: Define links schema in Convex
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a database schema to persist links and their labels so data survives across sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a `links` table in `convex/schema.ts` with fields: `url` (string), `title` (string), `favicon` (optional string), `label` (string), `savedAt` (number, epoch ms)
Remove the demo `todos` and `products` tables from `convex/schema.ts`
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create Convex queries and mutations for links
userStories.description: As a developer, I need backend functions to list, add, and remove links.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `convex/links.ts` with a `list` query that returns all links ordered by `savedAt` descending
Create an `add` mutation that accepts `url`, `title`, `favicon` (optional), and `label`, and inserts with `savedAt` set to `Date.now()`
Create a `remove` mutation that accepts a link `_id` and deletes it
Remove `convex/todos.ts`
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Create metadata fetching action
userStories.description: As a user, I want the app to auto-fetch page title and favicon so I don't type them manually.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a Convex action `links:fetchMetadata` that accepts a `url` string and returns `{ title: string, favicon: string | null }`
Extract `<title>` from the fetched HTML
Extract favicon from `<link rel="icon">` or fall back to `https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=HOSTNAME&sz=32`
If fetch fails (CORS, timeout, error), return URL hostname as title and Google favicon fallback
Timeout after 5 seconds
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Clean up demo files and set up root layout
userStories.description: As a developer, I need to remove scaffold/demo files and prepare the app shell.
acceptanceCriteria: Remove `src/routes/demo/` directory
Update `src/routes/__root.tsx` to render a minimal Neo Brutalism layout with app title 'Agar Tidak Lupa' and an Outlet
Update `src/routes/index.tsx` to render a placeholder page
App loads without errors on `npm run dev`
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Build the link input form
userStories.description: As a user, I want to paste a URL and pick a label so I can save a link quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/components/LinkForm.tsx` with a URL input (placeholder 'Paste a link...'), a label selector with predefined options (Article, Video, Tool, Reference, Inspiration, Other), and a Save button
On submit: call `links:fetchMetadata` action to get title/favicon, then call `links:add` mutation
Input clears after successful save
Save button shows disabled/loading state while fetching metadata
Neo Brutalism styling: bold 2px black borders, flat background colors, no rounded corners
Render the form at the top of `src/routes/index.tsx`
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Display saved links list
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see all my saved links in a clean list so I can find and revisit them.
acceptanceCriteria: Create `src/components/LinkList.tsx` that queries `links:list` and renders each link as a card
Each card shows: favicon (16x16), title, truncated URL, and a label badge with a distinct flat background color per label
Clicking the title/URL opens the link in a new tab with `target='_blank'` and `rel='noopener noreferrer'`
Show empty state message 'No links saved yet. Paste one above!' when list is empty
Neo Brutalism styling: cards with bold borders, strong drop shadows
Render the list below the form in `src/routes/index.tsx`
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add delete link functionality
userStories.description: As a user, I want to delete a link I no longer need so my list stays clean.
acceptanceCriteria: Each link card has a delete icon button using `Trash2` from lucide-react
Clicking delete calls `links:remove` mutation immediately (no confirmation dialog)
Link disappears from the list in real time via Convex reactivity
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
